title: Delicate American Chocolate Pancake
description: A spicy, silky American pancake featuring white chocolate, cooked on a tava griddle for a brunch‑mood delight.
instructions: In a bowl whisk 200g flour, 2 tsp baking powder, 2.5g salt, 30g sugar, 2.5g cinnamon, and 1g cayenne until well combined.
Stir in 60g chopped white chocolate until evenly distributed.
In a separate bowl beat 1 egg with 120ml coconut milk and 1 tsp vanilla extract.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir gently until just combined, avoiding overmixing.
Heat a tava griddle over medium heat and melt 20g butter, then swirl to coat the surface.
Pour 1/4 cup batter onto the griddle, spreading lightly, and cook until bubbles form and edges set, about 2 minutes.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 1-2 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
Serve hot with a drizzle of honey and a sprinkle of toasted coconut for extra silky texture.
